ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bioreactors" (
  "bioreactor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bioreactor */,
  "bioreactor_name" TEXT /* Name of the bioreactor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the bioreactor */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the bioreactor in liters */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the bioreactor (e.g., batch, continuous) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the bioreactor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the bioreactor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bioreactor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process run */,
  "bioreactor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bioreactor used for the run */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the process run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the process run */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who ran the process */,
  "process_type" TEXT /* Type of the process (e.g., fermentation, extraction) */,
  "batch_id" TEXT /* Batch ID for the process run */,
  "run_status" TEXT /* Status of the run */,
  "run_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the run */,
  "quality_assurance" TEXT /* Quality assurance checks and results */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_runs_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_runs_bioreactor_id FOREIGN KEY ("bioreactor_id") REFERENCES bioreactors ("bioreactor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the operator (e.g., technician, supervisor) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the operator */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the operator was hired */,
  "training_status" TEXT /* Training status of the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process log entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process run */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process data record */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log entry (e.g., start, end, error) */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator */,
  "log_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the log entry */,
  "log_action" TEXT /* Action taken in response to the log entry */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES process_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_logs_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)
